title: Continuing Actions and Motion Verbs
description: Learn to use verbs of motion with 'a' and practice continuing actions in Spanish.

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: How would you say 'I want to continue'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Quiero continuar. Good. How would you say 'I want to continue it'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Quiero continuarlo. Good. How do you say 'I am trying to continue'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Intento continuar. Good. What is 'demonstration' in Spanish?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Demostración. Notice there's no 'n'. How would you say 'to demonstrate'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Demostrar. Good. And if you remove 'de-', what does it become?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Mostrar, meaning 'to show'. What is the word for 'something'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Algo. Good. How would you say 'I want to show you something'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Quiero mostrarte algo. Good. How do you say 'I am going to'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Voy a. Good. How would you say 'I am going to confiscate it'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Voy a confiscarlo. Good. Now, how do you say 'I want to see them'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Quiero verlos. Good. And 'I am going to see them'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Voy a verlos. Good. How would you say 'I am trying to see them'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Intento verlos. Good. Now, how do you say 'I am going to try'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Voy a intentar. Good. How would you say 'I am going to try to see them'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Voy a intentar verlos. Good. Now, let's look at another verb of movement: 'pasar'. What does 'pasar' mean?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Yes, 'pasar' means 'to pass' or 'to pass by'. How would you say 'I am going to pass by to visit you'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Voy a pasar a visitarte. Good. Remember, with verbs of movement like 'voy' and 'pasar', we use 'a' before the next verb. How would you say 'I want to pass by to show you something'?

turns.speaker: tutor
turns.text: Quiero pasar a mostrarte algo. Good. Remember, 'a' connects verbs of movement to the next action.

outro.text: In this lesson, you learned how to use verbs of motion with 'a' and practiced continuing actions in Spanish.
Try creating your own sentences using 'voy a' and other verbs of motion. How would you say 'I am going to visit my friend'?
Remember, using 'a' with verbs of motion helps connect actions in Spanish. Keep practicing to internalize this rule.
